rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to require substantiation or certification reference before publishing evidence-dependent claims.
summary: Require substantiation, certification, or test evidence reference for performance, certification, or quantitative efficacy claims.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Certification, lab-tested, patent, or quantitative performance claims. ACTION: Confirm substantiation document exists and is readable in the ad. CHECK: Certificate scope, expiry, and on-ad legibility. ESCALATE IF: Evidence cannot be verified — route to Rule Corpus.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Certification mark is expired, scope-limited, or illegible at published resolution.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_include_concepts checked on playbook rewrite guidance text.
